name: Pineapple Cream Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and confectioners' sugar together until fluffy.
2. Beat egg yolks well and add one at a time, stirring after each addition.
3. Stir in the lemon extract and crushed pineapple.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the mixture along with the cream.
5. Line a loaf pan or springform pan with lady fingers. Place them around the sides of the pan as well as the bottom.
6. Mound half of the pineapple mixture in the pan.
7. Top with more lady fingers and pile in the remaining pineapple mixture.
8. Chill well before serving. Good for make-ahead dessert, it will keep two or three days in refrigerator.
Source: Good Housekeeping Cookbook
Barbara Day, Prodigy Food & Wine Board
